description_long: This is a modern, three-seater couch with a rectangular silhouette and clean lines, featuring a light gray, textured fabric upholstery. The seat consists of two large, plush cushions, while the backrest is divided into two matching, slightly angled cushions for ergonomic support. The armrests are broad and straight, seamlessly integrated with the main body of the couch, and are upholstered in the same fabric. The couch is elevated by four sturdy, block-style wooden legs with a natural finish, providing a warm contrast to the cool-toned upholstery. The back and sides of the couch are fully upholstered, with no visible accent or throw pillows. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, light gray fabric couch with two seat and back cushions, broad straight armrests, and exposed block-style wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two large seat and back cushions, broad armrests, and the wooden legs clearly.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the fully upholstered back, the depth of the seat, and the wooden legs' structure.
description_view_2: Direct back view displaying the continuous upholstered backrest and the alignment of the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Front-side view emphasizing the seat depth, cushion arrangement, and the integration of armrests with the couch body.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, rectangular seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all attached and integrated with the frame; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Light gray fabric with a subtle, woven texture; no visible decorative stitching, tufting, or patterned motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, block-style legs made of natural wood, square in cross-section, medium height, and positioned at each corner.
attribute_armrest_design: Broad, straight armrests at seat height, fully upholstered in the same fabric as the rest of the couch, with a rectangular profile.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, divided backrest with two attached, rectangular cushions, slightly angled for support, and fully upholstered.
